# Plan — 2026-05-19

## Summary

Based on the research report from 2026-05-19, 3 of 5 items from the previous cycle (2026-05-18) are resolved (MCP tool call timeout, --worktree CLI flag, compaction instruction preservation). Two items remain open with existing issues (#410 Goal-driven autonomous loop, #413/#425 Rewind/partial summarize). Three new gaps are identified from Claude Code v2.1.144 and Cline v3.0.7.

## Issues created

| 1 | #454 [mcp] Paginated tools/list support | small | mcp |
| 2 | #452 [provider] Startup API connectivity timeout | small | provider |
| 3 | #453 [provider] Agent usage reset per execute call | small | provider |

## Implementation Notes

### 1. MCP Paginated tools/list Support (small, < 4h)
- **Modify**: `src/mcp/client.ts` — Replace single `connection.client.listTools()` calls at lines ~91 and ~335 with a pagination loop that passes `{ cursor }` and aggregates all pages until no `nextCursor` is returned
- **Add helper**: `async function listAllTools(client: Client): Promise<Tool[]>` — encapsulates the pagination loop
- **Tests**: `tests/mcp/client.test.ts` — Test single-page response (no cursor), multi-page response (2-3 pages), empty response

### 2. Startup API Connectivity Timeout (small, < 4h)
- **Modify**: `src/providers/sapOrchestration.ts` — Add `AbortSignal.timeout(15000)` to the first API call (or wrap in a connectivity check utility)
- **Create**: `src/providers/connectivity.ts` — Optional utility that performs a lightweight health check with 15s timeout before the first real LLM call
- **Modify**: `src/providers/auth.ts` — Enhance error classification to specifically detect timeout from startup connectivity
- **Tests**: `tests/providers/connectivity.test.ts` — Test timeout fires at 15s, success path, error message clarity

### 3. Agent Usage Reset per Execute Call (small, < 4h)
- **Modify**: `src/core/agenticChat.ts` — At the top of `agenticChat()` (around line 267), ensure that usage counters from any prior task context are not carried forward. The `totalUsage` object at line 450 is already local to the function scope — verify this is truly isolated when called from agent-manager or subagent dispatch
- **Modify**: `src/core/costTracker.ts` — Add `resetSession()` method to allow per-task isolation of usage metrics when multiple tasks share a session
- **Tests**: `tests/core/agenticChat.test.ts` — Test that usage from prior execute calls doesn't bleed into subsequent calls
